name: @galerinaa/devtools-pci
description: PCI DSS 4.0.1 compliance audit for Galerina programs. Static analysis maps PCI requirements to Galerina contract patterns: cardholder data protection (Req 3), transit encryption (Req 4), access control (Req 7), audit logging (Req 10), secure development (Req 6). CI-runnable, no infrastructure needed.
